entities.name: Ilya
entities.context: Proposes bounding strategies to manage pricing/offer risk by limiting one leg of the triangle

entities.name: Triangle pricing model
entities.context: Framework with three legs (job descriptions, seats, time) where at least one should be bounded to manage risk

entities.name: Bounding the offer
entities.context: Risk management strategy of limiting at least one dimension of an unlimited-seeming offer

entities.name: Overage pricing
entities.context: Pricing model for when usage exceeds capped limits on job descriptions

entities.name: Add-on pricing
entities.context: Pricing model for additional seats beyond the included cap

relationships.context: Proposes bounding at least one leg of the triangle to manage risk
Uses the triangle framework to analyze offer structure and risk
Bounding is the risk management technique applied to the triangle model
Overage pricing applies when job description limits are exceeded
Add-on pricing applies when seat limits are exceeded
